mapper.select: SELECT hv.*, st.name AS student_name, t.name AS teacher_name FROM home_visit hv LEFT JOIN student st ON hv.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON hv.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY hv.id
SELECT hv.*, st.name AS student_name, t.name AS teacher_name FROM home_visit hv LEFT JOIN student st ON hv.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON hv.teacher_id = t.id WHERE hv.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO home_visit (student_id, teacher_id, visit_date, visit_type, content, feedback, next_plan) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{teacherId}, #{visitDate}, #{visitType}, #{content}, #{feedback}, #{nextPlan})
mapper.update: UPDATE home_visit SET student_id=#{studentId}, teacher_id=#{teacherId}, visit_date=#{visitDate}, visit_type=#{visitType}, content=#{content}, feedback=#{feedback}, next_plan=#{nextPlan} WHERE id = #{id}
